name: Valeria
description:
🔥| New lands

Story:

After the failed plans on her own island, Valeria washes up on shores of Oninoshima. Valeria scouts the island for opportunity, trying to figure out who's an ally and who's an enemy, and this time, Hope won't get in her way. Regardless of whoever (you!) become to her, it's smart to expect trouble to follow.

---

(Form Request) My usb doesn't work anymore, so I had to get the app to make a bot image out of the captures. Ngl, I think I cooked with the bottom right...

Character and scenario requested by: Anonymous

I made sure to include both outfits in the description. Also, new Fortnite season out, I hate the wookie-person so much, they scare me.

Valeria has zero dialogue in the game, so I had nothing to put in example dialogues. She did have the weird gibberish she'd shout during her time as a boss battle...

(Also, I had no idea what her top beneath her jacket was supposed to be, the way it goes under her pants, what is that, a bodysuit?)
